126.reason: [If the current character is '&' and next is not '&', after pos-- we are back at the original '&', then pos++ moves past it. However, if pos was already at the last character (i.e., line.charAt(pos) would be out of bounds), accessing line.charAt(pos) causes StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [If the current character is '&' and next is not '&', after pos-- we are back at the original '&', then pos++ moves past it. However, if pos was already at the last character (i.e., line.charAt(pos) would be out of bounds), accessing line.charAt(pos) causes StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]

138.reason: [Same issue as above: if '|' is the last character in the line, pos++ leads to accessing line.charAt(pos) beyond the string length, causing StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: if '|' is the last character in the line, pos++ leads to accessing line.charAt(pos) beyond the string length, causing StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]
